title: Import Voters
description: Bulk-register organisation members as voters for this election from a CSV or Excel file.

upload.title: Upload File
upload.drag_hint: Drop file here or click to select
upload.formats_hint: CSV, XLSX or XLS — up to 10 MB

preview.title: Preview — {total} rows ({valid} valid, {invalid} invalid)
preview.no_errors: All rows valid — ready to register voters.

error.label: Error:
error.invalid_format: Invalid file format. Please upload a CSV or Excel file.

info_panel.title: File Format
columns: email (required) — must be an organisation member
info_panel.note: Only existing organisation members can be registered as voters. Non-members are skipped automatically.
